---
title: ""
format:
    revealjs:
        title-slide-attributes:
            data-background-image: figs/logo.png
            data-background-size: 200px
        width: 1600
        height: 900
        margin: 0.1
        theme: [default, css/style.scss]
        css: [css/style.css, css/buttons.css, css/tabs.css, css/callouts.css, css/nav.css, css/revealhacks.css, css/quickfix.css]
        subtitle: ""
        author: ""
        toc: FALSE
        incremental: FALSE
        slide-number: true
        # auto-animate-easing: ease-in-out
        auto-animate-unmatched: false
        auto-animate-duration: 1.5   
        transition: convex
        background-transition: fade
        logo: figs/logo.png
        ligthbox: auto
        engine: jupyter 
        scrollable: true           

include-in-header:
    - file: scripts/scripts.js
    - file: scripts/LeaderLine/my-lines.js
revealjs-plugins:
  - leader-line
editor: source
---



## {.center}

{{< include _title.qmd >}}


## Common Myths & Misconceptions in Materials Modeling {.scrollable}

{{< include _myths.qmd >}}

## The Landscape {.scrollable}

{{< include _intro.qmd >}}

## {.scrollable}

{{< include _dft.qmd >}}


## {.scrollable}

{{< include _ase_qe.qmd >}}

## {.scrollable}

<iframe 
  src="figs/qe_workflow.html"
  width="150%" 
  height="100%"
  style="border:none;">
</iframe>

## {.scrollable}

{{< include _methods.qmd >}}



## Common Pitfalls {.scrollable}

{{< include _pitfalls.qmd >}}


## Skill Set {.scrollable}

{{< include _skills.qmd >}}

## Materials you can model {.scrollable}

{{< include _materials.qmd >}}

## Open Projects {.scrollable}

{{< include _projects.qmd >}}

<!-- ## About me {.scrollable}

{{< include _aboutme.qmd >}} -->




<!-- The end -->
## {.center}
{{< include _theend.qmd >}}
